hooks.command: bash 'HORIZON_SYSTEM_PATH/harness_configs/claude_code/hooks/log_hook_event.sh' Stop; s=$(python3 'HORIZON_SYSTEM_PATH/bin/resolve_sound.py' task_complete --harness claude_code 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$s" ] && bash 'HORIZON_SYSTEM_PATH/sounds/play_sound.sh' "$s"

bash 'HORIZON_SYSTEM_PATH/harness_configs/claude_code/hooks/log_hook_event.sh' PermissionRequest; s=$(python3 'HORIZON_SYSTEM_PATH/bin/resolve_sound.py' input_needed --harness claude_code 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$s" ] && bash 'HORIZON_SYSTEM_PATH/sounds/play_sound.sh' "$s" &

bash 'HORIZON_SYSTEM_PATH/harness_configs/claude_code/hooks/log_hook_event.sh' StopFailure; s=$(python3 'HORIZON_SYSTEM_PATH/bin/resolve_sound.py' api_error --harness claude_code 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$s" ] && bash 'HORIZON_SYSTEM_PATH/sounds/play_sound.sh' "$s" &
